# NetBird Machine Tunnel Edition

> Complete NetBird WireGuard VPN with Windows pre-login Machine Tunnel for Active Directory environments. Fork of [netbirdio/netbird](https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird) (AGPL-3.0).

## Quick Context

This fork adds a **Machine Tunnel** feature: a Windows SYSTEM service (`NetBirdMachine`) that establishes a WireGuard VPN tunnel before user login, enabling Kerberos authentication, GPO sync, and domain operations for remote Windows machines. Authentication uses AD CS machine certificates via mTLS.

## Core Documentation (read first)

- [README.md](README.md): Project overview, installation, configuration
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): System design, bootstrap sequence, network topology
- [docs/SECURITY-HARDENING.md](docs/SECURITY-HARDENING.md): Security model, certificate validation, threat mitigations
- [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md): Common issues, debug procedures, log analysis
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Detailed version history with file-level changes

## Machine Tunnel Client (fork-specific)

- [client/cmd/netbird-machine/](client/cmd/netbird-machine/): Windows service entry point, CLI commands
- [client/cmd/netbird-machine/service_windows.go](client/cmd/netbird-machine/service_windows.go): Service lifecycle, config loading
- [client/internal/tunnel/machine.go](client/internal/tunnel/machine.go): Machine tunnel orchestration, WireGuard setup
- [client/internal/tunnel/bootstrap.go](client/internal/tunnel/bootstrap.go): Two-phase bootstrap (setup key, then mTLS)
- [client/internal/tunnel/peerengine.go](client/internal/tunnel/peerengine.go): Signal/Relay peer connectivity
- [client/internal/tunnel/health.go](client/internal/tunnel/health.go): Health checks, DC connectivity monitoring
- [client/internal/tunnel/reconnect.go](client/internal/tunnel/reconnect.go): Reconnection logic with backoff
- [client/internal/tunnel/security_windows.go](client/internal/tunnel/security_windows.go): DPAPI encryption, secure config, key persistence
- [client/internal/tunnel/certenroll.go](client/internal/tunnel/certenroll.go): AD CS certificate enrollment
- [client/internal/tunnel/domainjoin.go](client/internal/tunnel/domainjoin.go): Domain join operations via tunnel
- [client/internal/tunnel/types.go](client/internal/tunnel/types.go): Configuration types and constants

## Server-Side mTLS (fork-specific)

- [management/internals/server/mtls_server.go](management/internals/server/mtls_server.go): Separate mTLS gRPC server on port 33074
- [management/internals/server/mtls_auth.go](management/internals/server/mtls_auth.go): mTLS authentication, identity extraction, CA trust
- [management/internals/shared/grpc/machine_tunnel.go](management/internals/shared/grpc/machine_tunnel.go): RegisterMachinePeer, SyncMachinePeer RPCs
- [management/internals/shared/grpc/machine_tunnel_test.go](management/internals/shared/grpc/machine_tunnel_test.go): Server-side tests
- [management/internals/shared/mtls/](management/internals/shared/mtls/): Identity extraction, issuer validation
- [management/server/peer.go](management/server/peer.go): Peer registration with mTLS support (MACHINE-TUNNEL-FORK markers)
- [management/server/activity/codes.go](management/server/activity/codes.go): PeerAddedWithMTLS activity (ID 150)

## Protocol (fork-specific additions)

- [shared/management/proto/management.proto](shared/management/proto/management.proto): RegisterMachinePeer, SyncMachinePeer, GetMachineRoutes, ReportMachineStatus RPCs

## Scripts & Deployment

- [scripts/install-netbird-machine.ps1](scripts/install-netbird-machine.ps1): Windows installer
- [scripts/bootstrap-new-client.ps1](scripts/bootstrap-new-client.ps1): Full bootstrap (install, domain join, cert enrollment)
- [scripts/reset-netbird-machine.ps1](scripts/reset-netbird-machine.ps1): Clean reset for testing
- [scripts/tests/](scripts/tests/): E2E test scripts for lab environment

## Architecture Decisions

- [docs/ADR-001-mTLS-Port-Strategy.md](docs/ADR-001-mTLS-Port-Strategy.md): Why separate port 33074 for mTLS
- [docs/ADR-002-CNG-Signer-Interface.md](docs/ADR-002-CNG-Signer-Interface.md): Windows CNG crypto integration

## Standard NetBird (upstream, unchanged)

- [client/](client/): Standard NetBird client (mesh VPN, peer connections, DNS, firewall)
- [client/internal/portforward/](client/internal/portforward/): Upstream v0.69 port-forwarding and PCP/NAT-PMP support, not enabled by default for Machine Tunnel PeerEngine
- [client/internal/metrics/](client/internal/metrics/): Upstream v0.69 client connection metrics components
- [management/](management/): Management server (accounts, peers, policies, routes)
- [signal/](signal/): Signal server (WebRTC signaling for peer connections)
- [relay/](relay/): Relay server (fallback when P2P fails)
- [proxy/internal/crowdsec/](proxy/internal/crowdsec/): Upstream reverse-proxy CrowdSec integration, included but not enabled in the Machine Tunnel lab profile
- [tools/idp-migrate/](tools/idp-migrate/): Upstream v0.69 IDP migration helper
- [shared/](shared/): Shared libraries (proto definitions, auth, utilities)

## Release & CI Notes

- [.github/workflows/upstream-sync.yml](.github/workflows/upstream-sync.yml): Detects the latest upstream release tag and creates sync PRs against that tag, not `upstream/main`
- [.github/workflows/release.yml](.github/workflows/release.yml): Public release workflow with fork-safe credential guards and Syft installation for SBOM generation
- [.goreleaser.yaml](.goreleaser.yaml): Main release artifact config, including SPDX JSON SBOMs for archives and Linux packages
- [.goreleaser_ui.yaml](.goreleaser_ui.yaml): UI Linux/Windows release config, including SPDX JSON SBOMs
- [.goreleaser_ui_darwin.yaml](.goreleaser_ui_darwin.yaml): UI macOS release config, including SPDX JSON SBOMs

## Key Patterns

- Fork code is marked with `// === MACHINE-TUNNEL-FORK START/END ===` comments
- Activity IDs 150+ are reserved for fork extensions (upstream uses 0-149)
- Machine config stored at `C:\ProgramData\NetBird\machine-config.yaml`
- WireGuard interface named `wg-nb-machine` (separate from standard `wt0`)
- Service runs as `NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM` in Windows Session 0

## Building

```bash
# Machine Tunnel client (Windows)
GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/netbird-machine.exe ./client/cmd/netbird-machine

# Standard NetBird client
GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/netbird.exe ./client

# Run tests
go test ./client/internal/tunnel/...
go test ./management/internals/shared/grpc/... -run MachineTunnel
```
